# Gentoolink Web Services

> Gentoolink Web Services helps small businesses get found in AI search - ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews. Founded and operated by Ken McGonigal. Services are AI visibility audits, structured data implementation, Google Business Profile optimization, and ongoing GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) work for local businesses.

Gentoolink Web Services is a Canadian web services company based in Vanderhoof, British Columbia, serving small businesses across BC and beyond. The primary focus is AI search visibility - auditing and fixing the technical gaps that prevent businesses from appearing when customers ask AI tools for local recommendations. Ken McGonigal works directly with business owners; no handoffs or black-box processes. All prices are in Canadian dollars.

Contact: ken@gentoolinkwebservices.com | +1 (604) 218-7290

## Services

- [AI Visibility Audit](https://gentoolinkwebservices.com/): $297 CAD - checks whether a business appears in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews; verifies Bing indexing, structured data validity, Google Business Profile completeness, and NAP consistency. Includes competitive comparison. Delivered as a plain-English PDF within 24 hours. The $297 fee is credited toward any implementation work.
- [AI Search Foundation Package](https://gentoolinkwebservices.com/services.html): $1,500 CAD - full implementation of the fixes identified in the audit. JSON-LD schema markup, Bing Webmaster Tools setup, content restructuring for AI citation, FAQ sections, and Google Business Profile optimization. Verified against Google Rich Results Test and the major AI platforms. Delivered in 5-10 days.
- [GEO Retainer](https://gentoolinkwebservices.com/services.html): $500-$1,500 CAD/month - ongoing AI visibility monitoring, schema updates, new FAQ and service page content, quarterly competitive reporting, and priority support.
- [Time & Money Audit](https://gentoolinkwebservices.com/time-money-audit.html): $297 CAD - an in-person audit for Northern BC businesses (Vanderhoof, Fort St. James, Fraser Lake, Prince George). Finds the hours and dollars leaking out of quoting, invoicing, and follow-up, then delivers a written plan to fix it. The fee is credited toward the fixes.

## About

- [About Ken McGonigal](https://gentoolinkwebservices.com/about.html): Background on Ken McGonigal, founder - web services since 2018, specializing in AI search visibility since 2025. Works directly with business owners in plain English.

## Content

- [Blog](https://gentoolinkwebservices.com/blog.html): Articles on AI search visibility, structured data, Google Business Profile optimization, and local business growth strategies.
- [Podcast](https://gentoolinkwebservices.com/media.html): Episodes for trades and small business owners on AI, lead capture, and automation.
- [Website Templates](https://gentoolinkwebservices.com/templates.html): Free example website designs by industry - restaurants, plumbers, electricians, auto repair, dentists, salons, landscapers, and more.

## Contact

- [Contact / Book an Audit](https://gentoolinkwebservices.com/contact.html): Book the $297 AI Visibility Audit or a free spot-check of your AI search visibility. Also used to start any service engagement.
